title: Sync local main after PR 17 merge
objective: Update the local main branch to match origin/main after PR #17 was merged, while preserving and not committing transient Tower operational artifacts in the working tree.
instructions: Inspect the current main worktree status and identify transient .control-tower operational changes and packet artifacts that should not be committed.
Update local main from origin/main so the worktree reflects the merged PR content.
Preserve local transient operational artifacts; do not commit, push, or discard them unless needed temporarily for pull hygiene, and restore them afterward if stashed.
constraints: Do not create commits, push, force-push, or rewrite published history.
Do not modify product code except what is required by the pull/update operation itself.
expected_outputs: ResultPacket with branch status, pulled commit range, and any temporary stash/use of transient artifacts.
definition_of_done: Local main is updated to origin/main.
Transient Tower operational files remain uncommitted after the sync.
